attributes.action: Launch an independent inquiry into foreign influence & dark money in UK politics
attributes.additional_details: Recent public concerns have highlighted the potential for foreign states, wealthy individuals, and offshore-linked entities to exert influence through political donations, indirect funding routes, lobbying, media support, and pressure surrounding major political appointments. We believe existing safeguards may be insufficient.
attributes.background: We urge the Government to investigate and report on foreign-linked funding, dark money networks, and lobbying influence affecting UK political parties and senior political decision-making.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

 https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760050
